New OpenClaw Update: AI Agents Now Control Your Real Chrome Browser

OpenClaw's latest update allows AI agents to control your actual browser sessions and automate complex business workflows without extensions. Learn how to leverage these new features to transition from simple chatbots to powerful, action-oriented AI employees.
